login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Seoul Aqua Service Operation Management System
login.errorLocked: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
login.errorInactive: This account is inactive. Contact your administrator.
login.errorRoleMismatchField: This is a field technician account. Please sign in from the technician login.

recovery.title: Forgot password
recovery.subtitle: Verify by SMS, then receive a one-time temporary password
recovery.step1Hint: Enter the phone number on file. We'll send a 6-digit verification code by SMS.
recovery.noticeCodeSent: We've sent a verification code by SMS. Enter it within 10 minutes.
recovery.step2Hint: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {phone}.
recovery.step3Hint: {username} — sign in with this temp password, the system will prompt you to set a new one right away.
recovery.step3Warning: This password is shown only ONCE. Copy or use it right now.
recovery.step3Continue: I've saved it — back to sign in
recovery.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
recovery.errorWrongCode: Incorrect code. Please check and try again.
recovery.errorExpired: Code has expired. Please request a new one.
recovery.errorExhausted: Too many wrong attempts. Please request a new code.
recovery.errorNoCode: No active code. Please request a new one.

dashboard.taxInvoicePendingHint: {count} B2B payment(s) reconciled but no tax invoice uploaded yet.

validation.shortcodeFormat: Shortcode must be 2-5 chars (A-Z, then A-Z/0-9)
validation.atLeastOneOps: B2B customer requires at least one OPS contact
validation.onlyOnePrimary: Only one OPS contact may be marked primary

customers.title: Customers
customers.name: Name
customers.searchPlaceholder: Search code / name / shortcode / phone / address / CCCD / MST
customers.deactivateConfirm: This will deactivate {code} ({name}). Active equipment will be deactivated and open contracts will be terminated. This is reversible by an Administrator.
customers.reactivateConfirm: Reactivate {code} ({name})? Equipment status will NOT be automatically restored — review each item separately.
customers.contactWarning: Editing the Contract Party affects existing contracts. Outstanding contracts may need to be reissued.
customers.deleteContactConfirm: Disable {name}? The record stays for history but portal login will be turned off.
customers.accountingToggle: Mark as accounting contact (receives tax invoices)

form.primaryHint: First OPS contact will be marked primary if none chosen.
form.b2bShortcodeHint: Used in B2B contract numbers (e.g. SHV → HD-…/SA-SHV)

sites.title: Sites
sites.name: Site name
sites.b2cOnly: Sites are only available for B2B customers.
sites.noSites: No sites yet — click Add site.
sites.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate site {name}? Active equipment at this site will be deactivated.

equipment.title: Equipment
equipment.replaceConfirm: The current unit will be marked REPLACED. Choose the new model and serial number.
equipment.relocateConfirm: Choose a different site (same customer only).

wizard.reviewIntro: Review the contract data below before submitting. The contract will be created in DRAFT state.

amend.title: Amend contract
amend.b2cNote: B2C amendments update the monthly fee in place and add an audit-log entry. The PDF is re-rendered.
amend.b2bNote: B2B amendments create a new revision row (A1, A2, …) linked to this parent contract.

renew.title: Renew contract
renew.intro: Pre-fills a new draft contract from this one. Adjust the monthly fee or term as needed.

validation.atLeastOneEquipment: At least one equipment line is required
validation.equipmentNotOwned: Equipment must belong to the chosen customer
validation.b2bShortcodeMissing: B2B customer needs a shortcode before issuing a contract

login.title: Customer Portal
login.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number
login.errorLocked: Account is temporarily locked. Please try again later.
login.candidatesSubtitle: This phone is linked to multiple accounts. Please choose:

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: Set a new password (minimum 8 characters).
changePassword.errorMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
changePassword.errorReuse: New password must differ from the current one
changePassword.errorGeneric: Could not change password. Try again.

forgot.title: Forgot password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your phone and name to receive a reset SMS.
forgot.name: Full name
forgot.sentBody: If a portal account exists for this phone, a reset SMS has been sent.

dashboard.welcomeBody: Track your equipment, visits, and service requests in one place.

equipmentDetail.visitHistoryEmpty: No visit history for this equipment yet.

requests.title: Service requests
requests.noRequests: You haven't submitted any requests yet.
requests.createSubtitle: Tell us what you need help with.
requests.noEquipment: No equipment on file. Contact the office.
requests.descriptionPlaceholder: What's happening? When did it start? (At least 10 characters.)
requests.preferredVisitAtHint: Optional — the office uses it when confirming the schedule.
requests.reasonCoveredByMaintenance: Covered by your active maintenance / rental contract
requests.reasonFirstRelocation: First relocation within 90 days of install
requests.reasonPaidDefault: Cost depends on the office quote
requests.confirmAuto: We auto-scheduled a visit. The office will confirm the technician shortly.
requests.confirmPaid: The office will review and reply within 1 business day.
requests.cancelHint: Once cancelled, this can't be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.phoneLocked: Contact the office to change your phone number.
settings.name: Name
settings.notificationsHint: Security notifications (passwords, receipts) are always delivered.
settings.smsOptOut: Opt out of promotional / reminder SMS
settings.emailOptOut: Opt out of promotional / reminder email

contacts.title: Company contacts
contacts.createComingSoon: Create / edit contacts via the office (portal support lands in a future phase).

createForm.title: New visit
createForm.subtitle: Pick a customer + service type, the office will assign a technician.

serviceRequests.title: Service requests
serviceRequests.approveScheduledForHint: Defaults to the customer's preferred time. Adjust if needed.
serviceRequests.approveLeadHint: Optional — leave blank to assign later.
serviceRequests.approveNotesHint: Recorded for the technician and future reference. Not shared with the customer.
serviceRequests.approveNotesPlaceholder: e.g. Confirm filter type beforehand. Call at the 9F office entrance.
serviceRequests.approveErrorPrice: Enter an amount (VND) of 0 or more.
serviceRequests.approvePriceHint: Set 0 to approve as a free / waived service.
serviceRequests.approvePriceFreeHint: Free service — visit created with no payment.

mobile.loginRoleMismatchOffice: Office staff must log in from the office login page.
mobile.noVisitsUpcoming: No upcoming visits in the next 7 days.

officeNote.title: Handoff to HQ
officeNote.hint: Relay information or messages to the office. Customers are not contacted directly.
officeNote.placeholder: Write a message for the office…

workScope.title: Scope of work
workScope.introInstallation: Install the new equipment, commission it, and verify operation. Bring all accessories and the install kit.
workScope.introPeriodicInspection: Periodic inspection. Check and clean the filters listed below, replace any that are due, and verify leaks, water quality, and overall operation.
workScope.introFilterReplacement: Filter-replacement visit. Swap the filters below, flush stale water, and confirm normal operation.
workScope.introRepair: Repair visit. Review the HQ handoff notes and the service-request description before diagnosing and repairing.
workScope.introRelocation: Relocation visit. Disassemble the unit, reinstall at the new location, and run a leak test.
workScope.introPaymentCollection: Payment-collection visit. Issue the receipt and confirm the amount collected.
workScope.introOther: Review the HQ handoff notes and the service-request description, then carry out the work.

complete.title: Complete visit
complete.findingsPlaceholder: Describe the work performed in detail.
complete.partsHint: Pick from the catalog or type to search.
complete.partsAddPlaceholder: Type a part name and press Enter
complete.suggestedHint: Items prefilled based on the equipment's replace/clean cycles. Uncheck any you did not perform.
complete.photosHint: Take 1-12 site photos. You can pick several from the gallery at once. Each is auto-compressed to 1080p.
complete.photosPendingBlock: There are photos waiting to be uploaded. Upload or remove them before continuing.
complete.signatureHint: Snap a photo of the signed paper or the on-screen signature.
complete.collectedHint: Leave 0 if the visit isn't billable.
complete.chargeOverrideHint: Differs from original expected {original} VND. Reason required.
complete.chargeOverrideReasonPlaceholder: e.g. extra parts, partial repair, goodwill discount
complete.chargeOverrideReasonRequired: Charge override requires a reason (≥5 chars).
complete.queuedForSync: Saved offline — will sync when you're back online.

mobile.noteHint: Notes from collaborators are appended to the lead's findings.

payments.title: Payments
payments.slaBreachWarning: Cash held > 48h — please hand over now.

taxInvoices.title: Tax invoices
taxInvoices.pendingSectionHint: B2B payments that are reconciled but have no tax invoice yet. Click an item to open the upload modal pre-filled with that payment.
taxInvoices.uploadPickPaymentHint: Only RECONCILED B2B payments are eligible.
taxInvoices.uploadFileHint: Upload the PDF generated by Viettel's e-invoice portal.
taxInvoices.uploadDropHint: or drag and drop a file here
taxInvoices.uploadSuccess: Invoice uploaded. Email queued to the contract party.

invoices.title: Tax invoices
invoices.b2bOnly: Tax invoices are available for B2B customers only.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Operational + financial insights across all phases.

technician-productivity.title: Technician productivity
technician-productivity.description: Visits completed + avg duration + late handovers

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Forensic search across every state change

daily.title: Daily visit summary
daily.description: Total + per-technician visit counts for the selected day.
daily.noTechnicianData: No technician-assigned visits on this date.

revenue.title: Monthly revenue
revenue.description: Recognised revenue from collected + reconciled payments.

productivity.title: Technician productivity
productivity.description: Lead-tech completions, avg duration, and handover SLA breaches.
productivity.noData: No completed visits in this window.

aging.title: A/R aging
aging.description: Outstanding receivables grouped by days overdue.

churn.title: Customer churn
churn.description: Deactivated customers per quarter with reasons and value lost.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Admin / Manager only. Search every recorded action in plain language.
audit.adminOnly: Audit log is restricted to ADMIN and MANAGER.
audit.unknownActionTooltip: This action code is not in the catalog. Please add a label.

products.title: Product catalog
products.subtitle: Brand, category, model, accessory, and consumable master data.
products.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {name}? History is preserved but new usage is blocked.
products.chargeHint: When no row matches, the default rule applies — Rental is always free, Sale is free within warranty (else billed), Maintenance is free for consumables and minor accessories (else billed).
products.notAllowed: This page is restricted to Admin or Manager.

companyContact.title: Company info
companyContact.description: Manage the HQ phone number, legal entity name and tax info. The phone feeds the technician's "Call HQ" button and every customer SMS / email; the tax info is used when generating contracts and tax invoices. Changes apply within 60 seconds.
companyContact.taxSectionHint: These values are inserted into the issuing-company block of contracts and tax invoices.
companyContact.savedNotice: Saved. New documents, calls and messages will use this value within 60 seconds.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Create, edit, or deactivate staff accounts. Phone changes and deactivation revoke that user's active sessions.
users.deactivateConfirm: Deactivate {name}? History is preserved but they can no longer log in and all active sessions are revoked.
users.fieldPasswordHint: User will be forced to change on first login (minimum 8 chars).
users.errorConflict: Phone is already in use by another user.
users.errorSelfDisable: You cannot deactivate your own account.
users.errorManagerOnAdmin: MANAGER cannot edit or deactivate an ADMIN user.
users.notAllowed: This page is only available to ADMIN or MANAGER.

merge.title: Merge customers
merge.description: Combine a source customer into a target. Source becomes INACTIVE and all references repoint to the target.

visitMap.title: Visit map
visitMap.comingSoon: Geocoded map coming soon. For now we show visit counts by region.
